VehicleComponentParams.vehicleDescription:
Manufacturer: Drake Interplanetary
Focus: Racing

The Drake Dragonfly is the perfect snub ship for anyone looking to live on the edge. With nothing separating the pilot from the dangers of space, the Dragonfly is as much an adventure as a ship! Dual-mode conversion allows the Dragonfly to operate on the ground or in space, and a rear-facing second seat means you can even take a passenger! This model features a custom Yellowjacket paintjob.

English.vehicleDescription:
Manufacturer: Drake Interplanetary
Focus: Racing

The Drake Dragonfly is the perfect snub ship for anyone looking to live on the edge. With nothing separating the pilot from the dangers of space, the Dragonfly is as much an adventure as a ship! Dual-mode conversion allows the Dragonfly to operate on the ground or in space, and a rear-facing second seat means you can even take a passenger! This model features a custom Yellowjacket paintjob.

Localization.Name: Drake Interplanetary
Localization.Description: Makes affordable, modular ships that have become the go-to manufacturer for anyone looking to get their first ship, but have become associated with criminal elements.

Localization.Name: WillsOp
Localization.Description: WillsOp have products to cover the whole spectrum of electronic analysis from tracking and targeting to scanners and deep-space radar.

English.Name: WillsOp
English.Description: WillsOp have products to cover the whole spectrum of electronic analysis from tracking and targeting to scanners and deep-space radar.

Localization.Name: Denning
Localization.Description:
Item Type: Radar
Manufacturer: WillsOp
Size: 0
Grade: C
Class: Civilian

With the Denning, you can now equip an award winning WillsOp radar to your vehicle.

English.Name: Denning
English.Description:
Item Type: Radar
Manufacturer: WillsOp
Size: 0
Grade: C
Class: Civilian

With the Denning, you can now equip an award winning WillsOp radar to your vehicle.

Localization.Name: Lightning Power Ltd.
Localization.Description: Made out of less expensive materials, Lightning Power continues to introduce new aesthetic changes to their ship components while relying on tried and true technology to run them.

English.Name: Lightning Power Ltd.
English.Description: Made out of less expensive materials, Lightning Power continues to introduce new aesthetic changes to their ship components while relying on tried and true technology to run them.

Localization.Name: Radix
Localization.Description:
Item Type: Power Plant
Manufacturer: Lightning Power Ltd.
Size: 0
Grade: C
Class: Civilian

With more than enough get up and go to handle your vehicle’s daily energy needs, the Radix from Lightning Power Ltd. is a power plant you can count on to get you where you’re going.

English.Name: Radix
English.Description:
Item Type: Power Plant
Manufacturer: Lightning Power Ltd.
Size: 0
Grade: C
Class: Civilian

With more than enough get up and go to handle your vehicle’s daily energy needs, the Radix from Lightning Power Ltd. is a power plant you can count on to get you where you’re going.

Localization.Name: Wen/Cassel Propulsion
Localization.Description: Subsidiary of RSI, handles a small percentage of their thruster and ship options construction as well as cooling systems.

English.Name: Wen/Cassel Propulsion
English.Description: Subsidiary of RSI, handles a small percentage of their thruster and ship options construction as well as cooling systems.

Localization.Name: Fridan
Localization.Description:
Item Type: Cooler
Manufacturer: Wen/Cassel Propulsion
Size: 0
Grade: C
Class: Civilian

The Fridan is Wen/Cassel Propulsion’s entry-level vehicle cooler. It has proven time and again that it can withstand even the worst environmental conditions, making it an ideal component for your vehicle.

English.Name: Fridan
English.Description:
Item Type: Cooler
Manufacturer: Wen/Cassel Propulsion
Size: 0
Grade: C
Class: Civilian

The Fridan is Wen/Cassel Propulsion’s entry-level vehicle cooler. It has proven time and again that it can withstand even the worst environmental conditions, making it an ideal component for your vehicle.

Localization.Name: Apocalypse Arms
Localization.Description: Apocalypse Arms produces aggressive, devastating weapons inspired by Messer-Era technology.

English.Name: Apocalypse Arms
English.Description: Apocalypse Arms produces aggressive, devastating weapons inspired by Messer-Era technology.

Localization.Name: Havoc Scattergun
Localization.Description:
Manufacturer: Apocalypse Arms
Item Type: Ballistic Scattergun
Size: 1

Sow dread across the battlefield with the Havoc from Apocalypse Arms. This size one scattergun deals massive damage at close range, making it the perfect weapon for finishing a fight.

English.Name: Havoc Scattergun
English.Description:
Manufacturer: Apocalypse Arms
Item Type: Ballistic Scattergun
Size: 1

Sow dread across the battlefield with the Havoc from Apocalypse Arms. This size one scattergun deals massive damage at close range, making it the perfect weapon for finishing a fight.

Localization.Name: Flashfire Systems
Localization.Description: Failed laser weapon manufacturer. Transformed into an engineering firm that came up with the weapon mount system that's almost uniformly used.

English.Name: Flashfire Systems
English.Description: Failed laser weapon manufacturer. Transformed into an engineering firm that came up with the weapon mount system that's almost uniformly used.

Localization.Name: VariPuck S1 Gimbal Mount
Localization.Description:
Manufacturer: Flashfire Systems
Item Type: Weapon Mount
Size: 1

The VariPuck fits between your weapon and the ship hardpoint to transform a fixed weapon mount into a gimballed mount, allowing the pilot to independently aim their weapon’s fire. This special VariPuck will accept any weapon the same size as the hardpoint it is mounting to.

English.Name: VariPuck S1 Gimbal Mount
English.Description:
Manufacturer: Flashfire Systems
Item Type: Weapon Mount
Size: 1

The VariPuck fits between your weapon and the ship hardpoint to transform a fixed weapon mount into a gimballed mount, allowing the pilot to independently aim their weapon’s fire. This special VariPuck will accept any weapon the same size as the hardpoint it is mounting to.

Localization.Name: Lightning Power Ltd.
Localization.Description: Made out of less expensive materials, Lightning Power continues to introduce new aesthetic changes to their ship components while relying on tried and true technology to run them.

English.Name: Lightning Power Ltd.
English.Description: Made out of less expensive materials, Lightning Power continues to introduce new aesthetic changes to their ship components while relying on tried and true technology to run them.

Localization.Name: Fuse
Localization.Description: This safety device provides protection to relays and other power systems from excessive current. Once tripped, fuses need to be replaced before normal operation can resume.

English.Name: Fuse
English.Description: This safety device provides protection to relays and other power systems from excessive current. Once tripped, fuses need to be replaced before normal operation can resume.

Localization.Name: Drake Dragonfly Yellowjacket
Localization.Description:
Manufacturer: Drake Interplanetary
Focus: Racing

The Drake Dragonfly is the perfect snub ship for anyone looking to live on the edge. With nothing separating the pilot from the dangers of space, the Dragonfly is as much an adventure as a ship! Dual-mode conversion allows the Dragonfly to operate on the ground or in space, and a rear-facing second seat means you can even take a passenger! This model features a custom Yellowjacket paintjob.
